events.description: Bulletin No. 142 issued by Board of Indian Commissioners regarding releasing Indians from Government Supervision
Board of Indian Commissioners sends batch of replies to Commissioner of Indian Affairs regarding condition of patent-in-fee Indians
Report giving record of original allotments for five tribes
J. C. Hart came to Pawnee Agency
Albert Primeaux sold all land except 80 acres for about $600
Mike Roy mortgaged land for $6000.00 or $6500.00 and leased for five years
George Primeaux deeded all land to children but keeps life use
Frank Eagle received patent, all land gone
Dick Gayton received patent and sold all land
Robert Tah received fee patent within last three years
Railroad Cisco received fee patent within last three years
David Williams received fee patent within last three years
Et Tayiah given certificate of competency, land sold
Helen Jones Burnett given certificate of competency, land sold
Harry Stubbs given certificate of competency
Claude McCauley given certificate of competency
Barclay Delano given certificate of competency
Forrest Chouteau land sold after certificate
Talbott Farnsworth 80 acres sold, 30 deeded to child
Ida B. Wifenbarger has all 400 acres (implied competent)
Lulu James died, willed allotment to sisters
Laura P. Randall 340 acres surplus sold, 160 homestead deeded to white wife
